name: part_001
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】hololive 3rd Generation Live#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜【DAY2】 [XJJXk28ivwY]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: A slideshow displaying numerous supportive messages and fan art from followers for the hololive 3rd Generation members.
A static waiting screen featuring the 3rd Generation members (Pekora, Flare, Noel, Marine) with a notice that the concert will start soon.
An 'Attention' slide with safety instructions regarding flashing lights and cheering rules.
A promotional showcase of various '2nd Round Goods' including penlights, t-shirts, towels, and acrylic stands.
A montage of fan-submitted short videos showing choreography and support, set to an upbeat song.

subtitles.original: hololive 3rd Generation Live きゅるるん大作戦
開演までしばらくお待ちください
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の点滅にご注意ください
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights during the performance.

subtitles.original: だいすき だいすき だいすき だいすき だいすき だいすき！
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you, I love you!

subtitles.original: 溢れるこの愛きっと止まらない
subtitles.english: This overflowing love surely won't stop.

subtitles.original: たくさんの素敵なショート動画ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you for many wonderful short videos!

subtitles.original: ぜひ音ありでお楽しみください！
